description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a light tan or beige faux leather or vinyl material. The sofa features a clean, boxy silhouette with straight lines and slightly flared armrests that are the same height as the backrest. The seat consists of a single, wide, flat cushion, while the backrest is divided into two large, rectangular cushions that are attached and flush with the frame. The sofa stands on four short, block-style legs, which are minimally visible and finished in a matching or slightly lighter wood tone. The upholstery has a subtle, fine-grained texture, giving the surface a soft, matte appearance with a hint of natural leather patterning.
description: A modern, light tan two-seater sofa with straight lines, flared armrests, and a single seat cushion. The upholstery is subtly textured, and the sofa stands on short, block-style legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's straight, flared armrest and the full height of the backrest, with the seat cushion extending the length of the frame.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the two attached back cushions, single wide seat cushion, and symmetrical armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the sofa's armrest profile and continuous seat cushion.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, unadorned back panel and the subtle texture of the upholstery.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One single, wide seat cushion and two large, attached rectangular back cushions; all cushions are uniform in size and flush with the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present, straight, and slightly flared outward, matching the height of the backrest with a boxy, padded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, made of wood with a simple, exposed design and a light finish.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight backrest with two attached, rectangular cushions forming a continuous, unbroken surface.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light tan color with a subtle, fine-grained texture resembling natural leather; no visible decorative stitching or patterning.
